case_title: HAROLD TICKTIN VS. MW LOGIC, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-29-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED AN UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO MW LOGIC, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED; IT WAS A COPY PLAINTIFF HAROLD TICKTIN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY TICKTIN, HAROLD ASSIGNEE AS TO DEFENDANT MW LOGIC, INC. AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY MURILLO, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TICKTIN, HAROLD ASSIGNEE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED MAY-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MW LOGIC, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM (AS ASSIGNEE OF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAROLD TICKTIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS IDEMINITY COMPNAY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SONYA SABAHAC, BOND CLAIMS LITIGATION SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANTS MW LOGIC INC. AND MARK MURILLO ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $295.00 SERVED JUL-14-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY
